benchmark: hybrid-vs-naive retrieval on distractor haystack (gate #1, retrieval form)
verdict: hybrid > naive with a decisive margin (100% vs 0%): important-but-old facts flooded by recent distractors are surfaced by hybrid+budget recall and completely missed by recency-only, within the same token budget.
note: This is the RETRIEVAL form of gate #1 (provable on free tier, ~0 quota: embeddings only). The end-to-end ACCURACY form (strong reader) is bounded by the permanently-dead qwen-plus and is recorded as a free-tier limitation, not a core failure.
